## Architecture of `pkg/worker/`

### (1) Complete file list

| # | File | Lines | Purpose |
|---|------|-------|---------|
| 1 | `worker.go` | 471 | Worker lifecycle: register, task loop, heartbeat, shutdown |
| 2 | `sandbox.go` | 1093 | SandboxManager: OCI container lifecycle (create/start/stop/delete) |
| 3 | `image.go` | 597 | CLIPImageManager: OCI→CLIP conversion, FUSE rootfs mounts w/ refcounting |
| 4 | `image_test.go` | ~135 | Tests for image manager |
| 5 | `interactive_task.go` | 261 |
